title: Thiruvanthipuram temple
tagline: Thiruvanthipuram temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Devanatha Hemabhujavalli Temple (also called Thiruvanthipuram Koyil) (Thiruvaheendrapuram) is a Hindu temple in Thiruvanthipuram, a village in the outskirts of Cuddalore in the Sou
overview.description: Devanatha Hemabhujavalli Temple (also called Thiruvanthipuram Koyil) (Thiruvaheendrapuram) is a Hindu temple in Thiruvanthipuram, a village in the outskirts of Cuddalore in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, dedicated to the god Vishnu and goddess Lakshmi. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Devanatha and Lakshmi as Hemabhujavalli. Though the presiding deity is D

topPlaces.name: Thiruvanthipuram
topPlaces.description: Thiruvanthipuram is a revenue village in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. Devanatha Hemabhujavalli Temple is one of the 108 Divya Desams.

topPlaces.name: Varakalpattu
topPlaces.description: Varakalpattu is a revenue village in Cuddalore district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Vamaneeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Vamaneeswarar Temple (also called Thirumanikuzhi Temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Thirumanikuzhi, a village in Cuddalore district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshiped as Vamaneeswarar, and is represented by the lingam.

topPlaces.name: Thirumanikuzhi
topPlaces.description: Thirumanikuzhi or Thirumaanikuzhi is a revenue village in Cuddalore district, state of Tamil Nadu, India. The village history is built around the Vamaneeswarar temple located in the village.

topPlaces.name: Padirikuppam
topPlaces.description: Padirikuppam is a Neighborhood of Cuddalore in Cuddalore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Nellikuppam
topPlaces.description: Nellikuppam is a town and a municipality in Cuddalore city Corporation in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. As of 2011, the town had a population of 46,678.

topPlaces.name: Thirupathiripuliyur
topPlaces.description: Thirupathiripuliyur is a neighbourhood of Cuddalore, Tamil Nadu, India. It is named for the ancient Hindu temple located in the locale, which is named after the Pathiri tree and Puliyur, a tiger-legged saint who obtained absolution in the area.

topPlaces.name: Kudalur, Thanjavur
topPlaces.description: Kudalur is a village in the Thanjavur taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thiruvanthipuram temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thiruvanthipuram temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thiruvanthipuram temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (148 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (153 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thiruvanthipuram temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thiruvanthipuram temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thiruvanthipuram temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thiruvanthipuram temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thiruvanthipuram temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thiruvanthipuram, Varakalpattu, Vamaneeswarar Temple, Thirumanikuzhi, Padirikuppam.
